items.name: Django
items.story: The French-inspired restaurant permanently closed after nearly two decades in business, citing unique market and economic conditions. It was originally located in the Hotel Fort Des Moines before relocating to Locust Street in 2018.
items.publicDescription: The downtown French-inspired restaurant Django permanently closed this spring.

items.name: Panka Peruvian
items.story: Authentic and elevated Peruvian cuisine that provided a warm, welcoming space on Ingersoll Avenue for nearly seven years. The owner announced the difficult choice to close in early April.
items.publicDescription: Authentic and elevated Peruvian cuisine that provided a warm, welcoming space on Ingersoll Avenue for nearly seven years.

items.name: Palms DSM
items.story: Upscale African-Caribbean style restaurant taking the metro by storm with dishes like braised oxtail and honey suya wings.
items.publicDescription: Upscale African-Caribbean style restaurant taking the metro by storm with dishes like braised oxtail and honey suya wings.

items.name: Scoops by Beth
items.story: Modern ice cream parlor in Highland Park offering inventive, small-batch flavors in a beautifully lit brick-and-mortar space.
items.publicDescription: Modern ice cream parlor in Highland Park offering inventive, small-batch flavors in a beautifully lit brick-and-mortar space.

items.name: Bar Martinez
items.story: Sophisticated lounge serving modern twists on classic cocktails in the historic Highland Park neighborhood.
items.publicDescription: Sophisticated lounge serving modern twists on classic cocktails in the historic Highland Park neighborhood.

items.name: Cactus Bob's BBQ Corral
items.story: Long-running neighborhood joint known for smoked meats, baked beans, and a laid-back, western-themed dining room.
items.publicDescription: Long-running neighborhood joint known for smoked meats, baked beans, and a laid-back, western-themed dining room.

items.name: Masao
items.story: Unique French-Japanese fusion spot in the East Village, offering a refined blend of sushi, plates, and pastries.
items.publicDescription: Unique French-Japanese fusion spot in the East Village, offering a refined blend of sushi, plates, and pastries.

items.name: Lachele's Fine Foods and the Fitz
items.story: Retro-inspired eatery delivering highly updated, locally-sourced, and elevated takes on classic American diner fare.
items.publicDescription: Retro-inspired eatery delivering highly updated, locally-sourced, and elevated takes on classic American diner fare.

items.name: Toyo Ramen & Japanese Street Foods
items.story: Fast-casual authentic Japanese ramen, gyoza, and donburi bowls in the District at Prairie Trail.
items.publicDescription: Fast-casual authentic Japanese ramen, gyoza, and donburi bowls in the District at Prairie Trail.

items.name: Kura Sushi
items.story: Interactive conveyor-belt sushi bar experience arriving at Jordan Creek Town Center.
items.publicDescription: Interactive conveyor-belt sushi bar experience arriving at Jordan Creek Town Center.

items.name: The Breakfast Club
items.story: Sweet and savory breakfast and brunch spot with a signature vintage comic book-themed décor expanding to Kettlestone Central.
items.publicDescription: Sweet and savory breakfast and brunch spot with a signature vintage comic book-themed décor expanding to Kettlestone Central.

items.name: Bubbies BBQ
items.story: Slow-smoked meats and all the fixings expanding the culinary scene in Pleasant Hill.
items.publicDescription: Slow-smoked meats and all the fixings expanding the culinary scene in Pleasant Hill.

items.name: Table 128
items.story: Beloved elevated American dining that successfully reopened in a fresh downtown location after previously closing its West Des Moines spot.
items.publicDescription: Beloved elevated American dining that successfully reopened in a fresh downtown location after previously closing its West Des Moines spot.
